issues.description: Trigger value 'Trigger' is invalid. Must be a specific trigger type: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn, or OnPlay variant.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is not valid. Legacy alias is 'TrashCard' which maps to 'ForceDiscard'. Use 'ForceDiscard' instead.
Missing required 'condition' field. Cannot determine target or scope of effect.
Missing required 'duration' field. Cannot determine how long effect applies.
